description: Headless multi-format CAD + mesh file I/O for OCCTSwift. MeshIO (pure-Swift) reads STL/OBJ/PLY/glTF/GLB/3MF/PMX/.x into a neutral Mesh; OCCTSwiftIO handles STEP/IGES/BREP, JWW, ScriptManifest, ML.
rules: Two products, two imports: `import MeshIO` for pure-Swift mesh I/O (no OCCT); `import OCCTSwift` + `import OCCTSwiftIO` for CAD B-Rep, JWW, manifests, and ML export.

CAD loading uses the `ShapeLoader` enum: `ShapeLoader.load(from:format:progress:)` and `loadRobust(...)` are `async throws` returning a `ShapeLoadResult`; `loadFromManifest(at:)` is synchronous `throws`. Use `loadRobust` to sew/heal gappy STL and IGES.
Select a load format with `CADFileFormat` (`.step`, `.stl`, `.obj`, `.brep`, `.iges`, `.jww`), or detect it via `CADFileFormat(fileExtension:)` (step/stp, stl, obj, brep/brp, iges/igs, jww).
`ShapeLoadResult` exposes `shapesWithColors` (per-shape color is nil for STL/OBJ/BREP/IGES), a `shapes` convenience, and STEP-only AP242 `dimensions` / `geomTolerances` / `datums`.

Export OCCT shapes with `ExportManager.export(shapes:format:to:deflection:)` (async throws). `ExportFormat` is `.obj`/`.ply`/`.step`/`.brep`/`.gltf`/`.glb`; meshed formats use `deflection` (default 0.1), STEP/BREP exact; multiple shapes write indexed.

Mesh I/O is synchronous and OCCT-free: `MeshIO.load(contentsOf:weldEpsilon:)` reads by extension and welds vertices (default 1e-4); `MeshIO.write(_:to:format:asciiSTL:)` writes by `format` or extension. PMX/`.x` read-only; writing throws.

`Mesh` is a value type (`positions: [SIMD3<Float>]`, `indices: [UInt32]`) with `vertexCount`/`triangleCount`/`bounds`; build via `Mesh.welded(_:epsilon:)` or `Mesh.indexedSoup(_:)`. Native readers `STL` / `OBJ` / `PLY` are callable directly on `Data`.

`ScriptManifest` (+ `BodyDescriptor`, `ManifestMetadata`) is Codable; ISO-8601 dates; `BodyDescriptor.color` decodes `[r,g,b,a]` to `SIMD4<Float>?`. Use `ImportProgressClosure { fraction, step in }` (optional `cancelCheck`); `TopologyGraph.exportForML()`.
